meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve can't collaborate (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't collaborate. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve Collaboration Issues
content.seo_description: Learn to implement robust user onboarding to fix collaboration friction. An intermediate-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for AI builders.
content.answer_block: Collaboration fails when users don't understand your app's workflow. By implementing contextual, step-by-step user onboarding, you bridge the gap between intent and action. This technical checklist guides you through building a reactive onboarding flow that eliminates friction, educates your users, and transforms your prototype into a professional-grade collaborative platform.
content.intro:
You have built a functional AI app, but your users are stuck in a void. They stare at an empty dashboard, unable to invite peers or initialize shared workspaces. The silence of an unused collaboration feature is the quiet killer of great student projects. You need to move from 'code that works' to 'an experience that guides.'

Onboarding is not just a welcome modal; it is the infrastructure of intent. By integrating a guided, state-aware onboarding sequence, you turn every new user into a power user. Let’s leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to build an onboarding engine that makes collaboration intuitive, professional, and inevitable.

steps.title: Define User State and Context
steps.description: Identify the exact moment a user is stuck. You must track user progress in your database to trigger the right onboarding step at the right time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React state management hook to track onboarding progress and user collaboration readiness.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file onboarding_hook.ts --task 'Implement progress persistence in local storage and API'

steps.title: Build Reactive Tooltips
steps.description: Create non-intrusive, context-aware tooltips that highlight collaboration buttons only when the user is ready to engage.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable Tooltip component that anchors to DOM elements and supports progressive disclosure of features.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file Tooltip.tsx --context 'Use Framer Motion for smooth transitions'

steps.title: Implement 'Empty State' Call-to-Action
steps.description: Don't leave a blank screen. Replace empty collaborative spaces with an inviting onboarding prompt that explains the value of inviting others.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design an EmptyState component that detects lack of collaborators and shows a 'Invite Teammate' CTA.
steps.claude_code_command: claude generate --task 'Create an EmptyState component for the CollaborationDashboard view'

steps.title: Add Interactive Walkthroughs
steps.description: Use a sequence-driven walkthrough to show users how to share their first project link. This builds confidence through small wins.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a step-by-step onboarding walkthrough controller that manages visibility of UI overlays.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Initialize Joyride or custom walkthrough logic in the main app layout'

steps.title: Instrument Performance Tracking
steps.description: Track the drop-off rate during onboarding. If users exit, your onboarding is too long or confusing. Optimize based on data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add event logging to the onboarding flow to track step completion rates using a mock analytics service.
steps.claude_code_command: claude update --file analytics.ts --task 'Add event tracking for onboarding milestones'

pro_tips: Never force onboarding; always provide a 'Skip' button to respect the user's intelligence.
Use 'Progressive Disclosure': reveal collaborative features only after the user completes a core task.
Map your onboarding sequence to a database 'onboarding_step' integer to ensure persistence across sessions.
Keep your onboarding copy human and benefit-driven, not feature-driven.
Test your onboarding flow in a fresh browser profile to ensure it doesn't trigger unexpectedly for existing users.
resources: UX Design Principles for SaaS: https://uxdesign.cc
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment and conduct a user testing session with peers to gather feedback on the flow velocity.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to turn a lonely app into a thriving collaborative hub. Implement these steps, watch your user engagement metrics climb, and solidify your reputation as a builder who understands the human element of code. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
